# LLMCosts.dev — Ai21 Models Pricing
> Source: LLMCosts.dev — https://llmcosts.dev
> Updated: 2026-04-09
> Route cheaper via OpenRouter: https://openrouter.ai/?ref=llmcosts
(Part 1)

| Model | Provider | Input/1M | Output/1M | Cached/1M | Context | ELO | Tier | Type |
|-------|----------|----------|---------|---------|---------|-----|------|------|
| [AI21: Jamba Large 1.7](https://llmcosts.dev/models/jamba-large-1.7) | Ai21 | $2.0 | $8.0 | $None | 256,000 | 1200 | standard | Closed |
